how-to-buy.subject: Interested in Purchasing Hops
how-to-buy.description: I would like to learn more about purchasing hops from John I. Haas — whether through contract or spot market. Please contact me to discuss options.

harvest.subject: Hop Harvest Inquiry
harvest.description: I am interested in information about the upcoming hop harvest — including availability, timing, and variety outlook. Please share any relevant updates or forecasts.
